instruction:
Complete a verifiable rainforest photo enhancement workflow using the image at /home/user/Desktop/dezalb-ecuador-1037212_1920.jpg. Each step produces measurable, verifiable outputs:

1. Create a new layer named exactly 'Green_Enhance' above the background. Use the Hue-Saturation adjustment: increase Green saturation by exactly +40 and Lightness by exactly +10 to make the foliage more vibrant.

2. Create a new layer named exactly 'Tree_Contrast' above 'Green_Enhance'. Use the Brightness-Contrast adjustment on the tree trunk area: increase Contrast by exactly +25 to enhance the bark texture details.

3. Create a new layer named exactly 'Shadow_Boost' above 'Tree_Contrast'. Use the Levels adjustment: move the shadow input level from 0 to exactly 15 to brighten the dark areas under the tree while preserving highlights.

4. Create a new layer named exactly 'Sunlight_Glow' above 'Shadow_Boost'. Use the Color Balance adjustment on the upper canopy area: add +30 to Yellow channel and +20 to Red channel to simulate warm sunlight filtering through leaves.

5. Create a new layer named exactly 'Vignette' at the top of the layer stack. Use the Elliptical Select tool to create an oval covering 70% of the image from center, apply Select > Feather with 100px radius, invert selection, and fill with black at 30% opacity.

6. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Title' at the top-center with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'RAINFOREST GIANT'
   - Font size: 32px
   - Color: #ffffff (white)
   - Position: centered horizontally, 25px from top edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Title'

7. Add a text layer named exactly 'Text_Location' at the bottom-left corner with these exact specifications:
   - Content: 'AMAZON'
   - Font size: 20px
   - Color: #90ee90 (light green)
   - Position: 20px from left edge, 20px from bottom edge
   - Layer name: exactly 'Text_Location'

8. Create a new layer named exactly 'Frame' at the very top. Use Select > All, then Edit > Stroke Selection with a 8px solid color #228b22 (forest green) to create a border around the entire image.

9. Export the final image as 'rainforest_masterpiece.jpg' with exact specifications: JPEG format, width 1400 pixels (height auto), quality 93. Save the project as 'rainforest_project.xcf' with all layers preserved.

command: import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 'e'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('rainforest_masterpiece'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')

import pyautogui; import time; pyautogui.hotkey('shift', 'ctrl', 's'); time.sleep(1); pyautogui.write('rainforest_project.xcf'); time.sleep(0.5); pyautogui.press('enter'); time.sleep(2); pyautogui.press('enter')
